title: cenostigma myabense var. myabense
intro: Cenostigma myabense var. myabense, also known as the "Myabense tree," is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cenostigma myabense var. myabense include its potential to alleviate fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
